title: Campaigners Demonstrate Against US Military Use at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: A group of campaigners assembled at Prestwick Airport to voice their opposition to the site's use by the US military. The demonstration attracted participants from various regions of Scotland, emphasizing the national concern regarding military operations at the airport.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The protest reflects growing public scrutiny of foreign military presence in Scotland. Activists are advocating for a reevaluation of the airport's role in American military logistics, raising questions about the implications for local communities and national sovereignty.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Campaigners rally at Prestwick Airport against US military use – see all the pictures
